introSection:
Montaña Rusa is a steel kiddie roller coaster which travels in Costa Rica. According to a photograph uploaded to Panoramio in January 2009, this roller coaster operated at some point at Parque Diversiones. It was known to be travelling in 2015.

It has an oval layout, black track and an orange train.
fullText:
Montaña Rusa is a steel kiddie roller coaster which travels in Costa Rica. According to a photograph uploaded to Panoramio in January 2009, this roller coaster operated at some point at Parque Diversiones. It was known to be travelling in 2015.

It has an oval layout, black track and an orange train.
